sentences.arabic: أَصْبَحَتِ المَطَارَاتُ الدَّوْلِيَّةُ اليَوْمَ بِمَثَابَةِ مُدُنٍ صَغِيرَةٍ تَعِجُّ بِالحَرَكَةِ وَالنَّشَاطِ عَلَى مَدَارِ السَّاعَةِ.
sentences.translation: Međunarodni aerodromi su danas postali poput malih gradova koji vrve od kretanja i aktivnosti tokom cijelog dana.
sentences.translationEn: International airports today have become like small cities teeming with movement and activity around the clock.

sentences.arabic: تَتَطَلَّبُ إِجْرَاءَاتُ السَّفَرِ الحَدِيثَةِ دِقَّةً عَالِيَةً فِي تَنْظِيمِ الرَّحَلَاتِ وَتَأْمِينِ سَلَامَةِ الرُّكَّابِ عَبْرَ أَنْظِمَةٍ تِقَنِيَّةٍ مُتَطَوِّرَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Moderne procedure putovanja zahtijevaju visoku preciznost u organizaciji letova i osiguravanju sigurnosti putnika putem naprednih tehničkih sistema.
sentences.translationEn: Modern travel procedures require high precision in organizing flights and ensuring passenger safety through advanced technical systems.

sentences.arabic: يَتَعَيَّنُ عَلَى المُسَافِرِينَ الوُصُولُ مُبَكِّرًا لِإِتْمَامِ عَمَلِيَّاتِ التَّسْجِيلِ وَالتَّفْتِيشِ الأَمْنِيِّ دُونَ التَّعَرُّضِ لِضَغْطِ الوَقْتِ.
sentences.translation: Putnici moraju stići rano kako bi završili procese prijave i sigurnosne provjere bez izlaganja vremenskom pritisku.
sentences.translationEn: Travelers must arrive early to complete check-in processes and security inspections without being subject to time pressure.

sentences.arabic: كَمَا تُوَفِّرُ هَذِهِ المَرَافِقُ صَالَاتِ انْتِظَارٍ فَاخِرَةً وَمَحَلَّاتٍ تِجَارِيَّةً تُلَبِّي كَافَّةَ احْتِيَاجَاتِ السُّيَّاحِ العَابِرِينَ.
sentences.translation: Također, ovi objekti pružaju luksuzne čekaonice i prodavnice koje zadovoljavaju sve potrebe turista u prolazu.
sentences.translationEn: These facilities also provide luxury lounges and commercial shops that meet all the needs of transit tourists.

sentences.arabic: رُغْمَ تَعْقِيدِ اللُّوجِسْتِيَّاتِ، إِلَّا أَنَّ التَّطَوُّرَ الرَّقْمِيَّ سَهَّلَ حَجْزَ التَّذَاكِرِ وَمُتَابَعَةَ حَالَةِ الرَّحَلَاتِ عَبْرَ الهَوَاتِفِ الذَّكِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Uprkos složenosti logistike, digitalni razvoj je olakšao rezervaciju karata i praćenje statusa letova putem pametnih telefona.
sentences.translationEn: Despite the complexity of logistics, digital development has facilitated ticket booking and tracking flight status via smartphones.
